ul.li: Constraint: AVX-512 instructions require 64-byte aligned boundaries for 0-latency load/store.
Pointer Guarantee: buffer.ptr is allocated via std::alloc::alloc_aligned(layout) where alignment=64.
generation increments globally in VectorStorage and is copied to VectorSlot on every insert at a reused index.
Validation: get(external_id) fetches (idx, expected_gen) from id_to_slot.
Failure: If slots[idx].generation != expected_gen, the vector has been deleted/re-purposed (detects stale handles).
Management: O(1) for insert/delete via free_list stack.

g.title: High-performance vector management with SIMD alignment and ABA protection.
